subjects.description: full visual description of the subject
subjects.appearance_details: additional visual details (accessories, texture, distinguishing features)
subjects.relationship: how this subject relates to others or to the scene
subjects.orientation: direction subject faces relative to camera
subjects.clothing: clothing and accessories; '' if non-human or N/A
subjects.expression: facial expression; '' if non-human or N/A
subjects.facial_features: notable facial features, including eye shape/color, hair color/style, lip shape, wrinkles, moles, scars, freckles, facial hair, and other visible fine-grained facial attributes; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.number_of_subjects: int; total in this subject group, 0 if N/A

subject_details.key_name_1: free-form image-specific attribute (keys vary by image content; {} if N/A)

background_setting: full prose description of the environment and setting

lighting.direction: where light comes from; 'None' for flat digital images
lighting.shadows: shadow description; 'None' for flat digital images

aesthetics.patterns: notable repeating visual patterns; 'None' if none

text_and_signage_elements.context: purpose or meaning of the text

quadrant_scan.top_left: description of what appears in the top-left region
quadrant_scan.top_right: description of what appears in the top-right region
quadrant_scan.bottom_left: description of what appears in the bottom-left region
quadrant_scan.bottom_right: description of what appears in the bottom-right region
quadrant_scan.absolute_center: description of what appears at the center

comprehensive_t2i_caption: a comprehensive, full-scene natural-language prose description of the image
